intro: Cynanchum vanlessenii is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and analgesic properties. The bioactive constituents of Cynanchum vanlessenii include alkaloids such as vanllesanine and vanllesenin, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Cynanchum vanlessenii is often prepared as a decoction or an infusion, and is also used in the production of herbal teas and tonics.
